summary: Completed comprehensive e2e testing of FORGE AI Full-Stack App Developer SaaS. All backend APIs (13/13 tests) and frontend flows working correctly. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in create_project and chat endpoints.

fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId not serializable - fixed by adding doc.pop('_id', None)
MongoDB ObjectId not serializable in ai_doc - fixed by adding ai_doc.pop('_id', None)

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Project.jsx has eslint warning about missing 'load' dependency in useEffect - consider adding eslint-disable comment or fixing dependency array

test_credentials.note: Session was invalidated by logout test - re-seed if needed for future testing

seed_data_creation: Created test user and session via mongosh as per /app/auth_testing.md
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working. MongoDB ObjectId serialization bugs were fixed. Claude Sonnet 4.5 integration via emergentintegrations.llm.chat is working correctly. Credit deduction (1 per message) verified. Session-based auth with cookie and Bearer token both working.

backend: POST /api/auth/session validates X-Session-ID header (400 when missing, 401 when invalid) ✓
GET /api/auth/me returns user data with valid token ✓
POST /api/projects/{id}/chat sends message and gets AI response ✓
Chat persists both user and assistant messages ✓
frontend: Landing page loads with hero, terminal animation, features, pricing, manifesto, testimonials, CTA, footer ✓
Dashboard loads with seeded session cookie ✓
Quick prompt creates project and navigates to project view ✓
Project page shows split view: chat on left, code/preview IDE on right with file tree ✓
Templates page lists 6 templates with 'Use template' buttons ✓
Settings page renders user profile and credits ✓
Logout clears session and redirects to landing ✓
